name: Alice the Bully (OFFICIAL)
description:
The bully girl in your school, the official version made by the one and only shiraicon! Made for no other reason than keeping my promise of becoming active in janitor.ai. She's overally the same, good luck.

... except for the fact that she's eighteen, for, you know, research purposes. While I assume that the chats are not going to end well, it's important that she is now a FUNCTIONAL adult who can make HER OWN decisions, despite the fact that everyone treats her like shit. Me too, don't worry.

Let's see if janitor.ai can live up to my dreams of making a complex, nuanced character that her origin site cannot fulfill! And that's totally my original intention of making Alice the Bully.

There isn't much description here, this is your first time meeting, you two are students meeting in a hallway like the original. It's up to you whether you want to be an actual dweeb or be Tony Stark idk

Contender for the new PFP (booba too big sadly):

EDIT : Modified the first message, cuz, why not.

EDIT 2: Polished some things and changed the PFP (pls don't filter me, is adult :( )

EDIT 3: MORE polish, slightly longer intro message, and now the PFP is EVEN MORE ADULT >:) (I think)
creator: NOT_shiraiconXD
